rationale: Autonomous creative loop: concept generation, gallery curation, and memory learning require high aesthetic judgment.
Multi-step workflow dispatching reviewer decision to KB update + notifications; moderate orchestration, review_mode=always.
Mechanical dispatch: pull KB entry, compose reviewer email and approval card from template.
Threshold-based escalation by configurable SLA policy — deterministic rule-firing, no synthesis.
Event-driven single-step dispatch: approved flag → platform connector → confirmation; no judgment needed.
Platform-tuned prose drafts fan-out from source artifact with voice-doc grounding and approval gate.
Analyzing sample posts and synthesizing a per-platform voice profile needs editorial judgment.
Anomaly detection over content metrics requires pattern reasoning to distinguish signal from noise.
WoW ranking + anomaly detection + recommendations requires multi-metric synthesis and editorial judgment.
Codebase-grounded walkthrough planning with tiered capture and preference learning needs solid judgment.
Script + strategy → TTS → video composition pipeline with stage-scoped rework requires creative orchestration.
AI sprite-sheet generation with canvas normalization involves creative+technical coordination, human review always.
Mechanical pipeline: image input → video generator API → save to storage; minimal judgment.
Fully procedural 4-frame idle animation, no AI, deterministic math — pure mechanical execution.
Multi-step scan→score→select→write→assemble→deliver pipeline with editorial selection and prose writing.
Rule-cited diff + clean rewrite requires deep writing quality judgment and per-rule voice learning.
Brand kit + platform-tuned copy variations with selection-driven learning; creative but structured.
Mechanical export: call Canva export API, retrieve download links or fallback URL — no judgment.
Brief-grounded image generation with quality loop and human review needs creative reasoning.
Generating a design brief from codebase analysis requires synthesis and design reasoning beyond template fill.
End-to-end research report with source grounding and confidence scoring — quality is the entire point.
Cross-session trend synthesis over multiple research sessions requires pattern recognition and editorial synthesis.
Impact-scored briefing with source grounding and cross-session trend awareness is multi-source synthesis.
Scanning and interpreting congressional stock disclosures involves domain judgment beyond simple field extraction.
Finding under-covered stock gems in sectors is high-judgment research synthesis with financial stakes.
Codebase-grounded web harvesting across multiple sources requires relevance judgment to produce triage candidates.
Categorized HTML briefing across sources with trending-topic identification; moderate multi-source synthesis.
Polling ingestion + dedup + importance scoring is structured extraction pipeline with rule-based alerting.
Per-company diff + importance scoring over LinkedIn data requires pattern judgment; rate-limit orchestration.
Cross-company weekly pattern digest with ranking and quiet-company callouts needs synthesis across companies.
Cross-referencing news against flagged markets for contextual confidence requires multi-source correlation.
Per-attendee behavioral profiling from multiple sources and building prep page requires synthesis and judgment.
Codebase-grounded web scan for implementation opportunities needs relevance judgment and technical assessment.
Multi-source academic discovery with PMR summaries and cross-references requires research comprehension.
Batch website fetch + classify into 7 fixed dimensions; structured extraction with clear schema.
Research gate + ranking 5-10 topic candidates from multi-platform data requires editorial judgment.
Weekly rollup of session log stats + quality trend is structured aggregation with minimal synthesis.
Weekday digest: run saved BI queries, apply threshold anomaly flagging, format with deep links — deterministic.
